calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonna Thomas for (administrator) Barbara Palmer.

The Court stated that it has the submission isolating time regarding extraordinary services, that it does appear that time was spent identifying heirs, legal research, waivers of account and that some of the fees fall within ordinary services. Ms. Thomas stated that they have several people in their firm, that in doing research had to go to the library to research probate law for 1959, that this case was rather extraordinary, that there are multiple levels of heirs and working with foreign law, that it created a litany of extraordinary tasks and that the decedent died in 1959. The Court stated that it understands the arguments, will go over the time records and took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Continued To Dec-22-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Baer for Barbara Palmer.

The Court stated that we are here on two petitions. Mr. Baer stated that they have resolution on the second petition (Mayo & Mayo), Mr. Baer gave an overview of the stipulation to the court and stated that the stipulation has been e-filed but is not on the register of actions yet. The Court stated that it needs to be filed and the court provided with file endorsed copies and that regarding the accounting petition there is a variety of notes by the examiner that have not been fully responded to. Mr. Baer stated that he could submit a declaration regarding funds. The Court stated that there are other notes that have not been addressed and that they need to be addressed before resolution of the petition. The accounting petition re fees was taken under submission. The accounting petition re report, fees and final distribution was continued to December 15, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to respond to the examiners notes.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Apr-18-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for Barbara Palmer. Ernest Der for Stephen Brush.

Mr. Der stated that he just filed the petition to remove the current Administrator with a hearing date of April 5, 2011 and that he thinks his Client will be filing a petition to be appointed. Ms. Mayo explained how Ms. Palmer got involved in the case. The Motion to Be Releived as Counsel was continued to April 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition for Final Distribution which is on calendar for tomorrow was also continued to April 18, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Der's petition will also be continued to that same date. The Court ordered that the funds sent to the UBS account be blocked effective today. Status of filing the receipt for the blocked account was set for March 14, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Brown.
